title: The Hairy Ape
writer: Eugene O'Neill, Robert Hardy Andrews, Decla Dunning
actors: William Bendix, Susan Hayward, John Loder
plot: During the 1940s, social class conflict is depicted when a spoiled socialite, traveling on a freighter, calls the ship's head stoker a hairy ape, provoking him into stalking the rich woman once ashore in New York.
